elements.title: Paris on the Hudson
elements.contents: ... that a Buddhist temple is nestled amid Paris on the Hudson (pictured)?

elements.title: Bottleworks District
elements.contents: ... that the stairs of the Bottleworks District hotel were designed to resemble a soda fountain?

elements.title: Izumi Kobayashi
elements.contents: ... that an Izumi Kobayashi song was said to "[bridge] the gap between Prince-inspired funk and vintage synth-heavy Thomas Dolby"?

elements.title: Capen Hill Nature Sanctuary
elements.contents: ... that Capen Hill Nature Sanctuary allows visitors to meet axolotls, bearded dragons, and a domesticated rat?

elements.title: T. J. Watt
elements.contents: ... that T. J. Watt and his brother J. J. were the first brothers to appear together on a Wheaties box?

elements.title: Copenhagen Tunnel
elements.contents: ... that the spoil from digging the Copenhagen Tunnel was used to make its bricks, a method new to London at the time?

elements.title: Patrick Leung
elements.contents: ... that Patrick Leung won the Hong Kong Film Award for Best Director in 2026 with a 2019 film?

elements.title: election cakes
elements.contents: ... that Americans ate election cakes at weddings and high teas?

elements.title: Zac Alcorn
elements.contents: ... that Zac Alcorn went from the lowest level of college football straight to the NFL?
